name: Frappe LMS
tagline: Open source learning management system built on Frappe
description: Frappe LMS is an open-source learning management system designed for creating, managing, and delivering online courses, built on the Frappe framework. It supports structured courses, lessons, quizzes, progress tracking, and learner management through a web interface.

features.title: Course management
features.description: Create and organize courses with structured lessons and learning paths.

features.title: Lesson delivery
features.description: Deliver text and media-based lessons through a web interface.

features.title: Learner enrollment
features.description: Enroll and manage learners across courses and programs.

features.title: Progress tracking
features.description: Track learner progress and course completion status.

features.title: Quizzes and assessments
features.description: Create quizzes to assess learner understanding and performance.

features.title: User roles and permissions
features.description: Manage instructors, learners, and administrators with role-based access.

features.title: Web-based interface
features.description: Access and manage the LMS entirely through a browser-based UI.

features.title: Frappe framework integration
features.description: Built on the Frappe framework for extensibility and customization.
